title: alyssum austrodalmaticum
intro: Alyssum austrodalmaticum, also known as Dalmatian alyssum, is a low-growing, flowering plant in the borage family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of alyssum austrodalmaticum include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, but its use should be done under the guidance of a medical professional due to the lack of extensive research on its efficacy and potential side effects.
